events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. DTI = Direct Tension Indicator washers with "squirter" type (silicone squirt out when proper tension reached). Not fully crushed means bolts not properly tensioned to required preload. RCSC Specification requires proper pretensioning for slip-critical connections and other specified joints. Squirter DTIs must show silicone squirted out indicating proper tension. Not fully crushed = insufficient tension = non-compliant.

Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural bolting insufficient tension can lead to connection failure). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: rough-complete maybe 85%. Confidence high.
